title: Broccoli and Chicken Stir Fry
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"15j03","text":"A simple broccoli and chicken stir fry to create as college students with limited cooking experience and ingredients","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Make sure your chicken is defrosted! If not, try manually defrosting it with warm water in a plastic bag or its original packaging In this step, you will have to gather your ingredients: 2 heads of broccoli 3 defrosted chicken breasts 2/3 cup of soy sauce 1/3 cup of oyster sauce honey (as much as desired) 2 tablespoons water 2 tablespoons cornstarch 2 teaspoons vegetable oil
Stir soy sauce and oyster sauce together in a bowl. Mix in as much honey as desired (all portion sizes for the sauce are modifiable to suit personal taste)
Chop the heads of the broccoli into florets and wash thoroughly
Cut the chicken breasts into 1-inch-sized cubes
Mix water and cornstarch together in a small bowl and stir until the cornstarch dissolves completely.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet over high heat for 00:01:00 Make sure your hands are not wet to avoid getting the oil to react with stray droplets of water
Fry chicken in hot oil until chicken is no longer pink in the center, for 00:05:00
Stir in broccoli with chicken and sauté until broccoli is hot, for 00:05:00 .
If the chicken is not ready yet, fry it for another 00:02:00

Push the chicken and vegetable mixture to the side of the skillet. Pour the soy sauce mixture into the vacant part of the skillet. Stir cornstarch slurry into the soy sauce mixture until the color is consistent.
Move chicken and vegetables back into the center of the pan; sauté until sauce thickens and coats chicken and vegetables, for 00:05:00 .
Move your broccoli and chicken stir-fry onto a plate and serve. The recipe as made with modifications to this website's recipe https://www.allrecipes.com/recipe/240708/broccoli-and-chicken-stir-fry/
creator: Andy Ouyang
